title: Darshan Hiranandani : How Can I Highlight a Cell to Indicate a Missed Due Date?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I’m trying to find a way to highlight a cell when a date needs to be changed to show that a deadline was missed. I want the cell to automatically change color to indicate that the due date wasn’t met. Howev…

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m trying to find a way to highlight a cell when a date needs to be changed to show that a deadline was missed. I want the cell to automatically change color to indicate that the due date wasn’t met. However, the automations I’ve tried so far haven’t been helpful.

Has anyone faced a similar situation or have suggestions on how to implement this? I’d appreciate any tips!

Thanks in advance!
Regards
Darshan Hiranandani

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about conditional coloring?
